title: APM: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Attack in Request
description: Detects XSS attack payloads in HTTP URLs, query parameters, and request bodies captured by the SOC Application Logs parser from OpenTelemetry-shaped browser/application telemetry. Covers reflected, stored, and DOM-based XSS vectors including script injection, event handlers, and javascript: URIs.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ((('Request URL' like '*%3Cscript*' or 'Request URL' like '*%3C/script*' or 'Request URL' like '*%3Csvg*' or 'Request URL' like '*%3Cimg*' or 'Request URL' like '*%3Ciframe*')) or (('Request URL' like '*onerror=*' or 'Request URL' like '*onload=*' or 'Request URL' like '*onmouseover=*' or 'Request URL' like '*onfocus=*' or 'Request URL' like '*onclick=*')) or (('Request URL' like '*javascript:*' or 'Request URL' like '*javascript%3A*' or 'Request URL' like '*vbscript:*' or 'Request URL' like '*data:text/html*')) or (('Request URL' like '*document.cookie*' or 'Request URL' like '*document.write*' or 'Request URL' like '*document.location*' or 'Request URL' like '*.innerHTML*' or 'Request URL' like '*eval(*' or 'Request URL' like '*String.fromCharCode*'))) | stats count as Attacks by 'Request URL', 'HTTP Method', 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | sort -Attacks
falsepositives: Security scanning tools during authorized testing
